findings.location: \subsection{CoT 的强处：用文本轨迹构造外部迭代}
findings.issue: The subsection explains the mechanism clearly, but its source grounding is mostly attributed to the video in general rather than tied to a specific timestamped figure or subtitle moment.
findings.recommendation: Add a concrete timestamped source reference or quoted/paraphrased subtitle anchor for the four-step CoT flow, matching the stronger grounding used around the figures.

findings.location: \subsection{CoT 的代价：每次更新都穿过 token 窄门}
findings.issue: The term “token 窄门” is vivid and central, but the cost dimensions are listed mostly qualitatively. Readers may benefit from a compact formalization of why sequence growth raises cost.
findings.recommendation: Add one concise formula such as attention cost scaling with sequence length, e.g. self-attention roughly grows as \(O(n^2)\), to make the computational implication more precise.

findings.issue: The takeaway is reader-facing and directly restates the chapter claim, creating a strong bridge into Loop Transformer.
findings.recommendation: Keep this conclusion-first and transition-oriented structure in the integrated document.

audit.evaluation_context: Teaching-PDF section checkpoint: validate that this Bilibili chapter draft has a clear teaching claim, coherent subsection hierarchy, distinct same-level groups, source-grounded examples, and a reader-facing takeaway before integration.
